title: CON EDISON INVESTOR MATERIAL FOR CONFERENCES IS AVAILABLE FOR ONLINE VIEWING
text: NEW YORK , Feb. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Con Edison (NYSE: ED) executives will meet with investors at three conferences next week and the company is making the presentation material available for viewing on its website. Investors and other interested parties can see the material at  Presentations & Webcasts | Consolidated Edison, Inc. (conedison.com).

title: The 10 Biggest Utilities With Over 50% Gross Margin
text: Profits for utility companies vary widely depending on region to region. Despite this, the utility sector enjoys relatively high profit margins, primarily due to barriers to entry and other legislative restrictions on competition.

title: Consolidated Edison (ED) Q4 Earnings Beat, Revenues Up Y/Y
text: Consolidated Edison's (ED) Q4 revenues of $4,031 million surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 14.6%. The top line also improves 18% from the year-ago quarter.

title: Consolidated Edison (ED) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Con Ed (ED) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.85% and 14.58%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: CON EDISON REPORTS 2022 EARNINGS
text: NEW YORK , Feb. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE: ED) today reported 2022 net income for common stock of $1,660 million or $4.68 a share compared with $1,346 million or $3.86 a share in 2021. Adjusted earnings were $1,620 million or $4.57 a share in 2022 compared with $1,528 million or $4.39 a share in 2021.

title: 7 Stocks That Wall Street Hates — and YOU Should Buy!
text: While it's usually not the wisest move to trade against Wall Street experts, sometimes, they overlook certain ideas, presenting contrarian opportunities among stocks to buy. To be sure, the politics of the investment analysis world dictates that experts lean more bullishly; otherwise, it's difficult to establish relationships with corporate movers and shakers.

title: Week Ahead: Inflation Data, Interest Rates, and Time to Buy Shopify Breakout?
text: With earnings season nearing its end, and inflation data coming out on Tuesday, there is a lot of information for the market to work through

title: What's in Store for Consolidated Edison (ED) in Q4 Earnings?
text: Consolidated Edison's (ED) Q4 results are likely to reflect moderate weather pattern amid snowstorm impacts.

title: Con Edison Executives to Speak on RBC Navigating the Energy Transition Panel, February 9
text: NEW YORK , Feb. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison's Senior Vice President of Customer Energy Solutions, Vicki Kuo, and Vice President of Manhattan Electric Operations, Lisa Primeggia, will speak on a panel hosted by RBC Capital Markets and focusing on Electric Vehicles and the Grid. The virtual panel will be held on February 9 th at 9 a.m.
